evidence.scientific_clarity: Stacked bars sum to 100%, y-axis uses percent labels 0–100%, five conditions and four classes clearly shown — brief requirement fully met.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype set; PDF embeds DejaVuSans as Type 3 (non-selectable); SVG renders text as glyph paths not <text> elements; default DejaVu Sans font used throughout.
evidence.palette: Green (#55A868) and red (#C44E52) are used as categorical classes B and C — this pair is indistinguishable for deuteranopes; no colorblind-safe palette (e.g. Wong or Okabe-Ito) applied.
evidence.layout_density: 6×4 inch figure with tight_layout and bbox_inches=tight; legend placed outside right edge; no overlapping labels; y-range exactly 0–1; space well used.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure structure but contains no numerical finding; legend is outside the axes which is acceptable but caption lacks a specific claim a reviewer would expect.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF uses Type 3 font embedding (pdffonts confirms BMQQDV+DejaVuSans Type 3); text is not selectable or editable; script does not set matplotlib.rcParams['pdf.fonttype']=42.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (12 KB), figure.png (24 KB), figure.svg (30 KB), caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption describes chart type and data derivation but provides no specific numerical finding (e.g. 'Class A dominates condition X at ~Y%'); too generic for a journal figure.

overall_strengths: Clean layout with proper percent y-axis, outside legend, and no overlapping elements — the figure is immediately readable.
All required output files (PDF, PNG, SVG, caption, script) are present and non-trivial.
overall_weaknesses: Typography is broken: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none' are not set, so text is stored as Type 3 glyph paths — not selectable, not editable, and will fail journal submission checks.
Palette uses a green/red pair (classes B and C) that is indistinguishable under deuteranopia, and the caption contains no quantitative finding to anchor the reader's interpretation.
